data.title: DDOS Protection
data.description: Systems in place to prevent and mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google's infrastructure to filter traffic and sustain service under high load.

data.title: Secure Data Transmission
data.description: End-to-end encryption for all data in transit between users and YouTube servers.
data.technical_spec: HTTPS and Transport Layer Security (TLS) are standard.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Robust authentication mechanisms to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication (2FA) and OAuth 2.0 for secure logins.

data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: Automated and manual systems to detect and remove harmful content.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms assist in detecting inappropriate content.

data.title: Privacy Controls
data.description: User privacy is protected through customizable privacy settings and robust data protection policies.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to GDPR and CCPA standards, offering detailed user data controls.
